Package org.eventb.core.sc

Enum Class GraphProblem

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<GraphProblem>
org.eventb.core.sc.GraphProblem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<GraphProblem>, Constable, IRodinProblem
public enum GraphProblem extends Enum<GraphProblem> implements IRodinProblem
Since:
1.0

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static GraphProblem[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static GraphProblem valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • valueOfErrorCode

      public static GraphProblem valueOfErrorCode(String errorCode)

    • getSeverity

      public int getSeverity()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinProblem
      Returns the severity of this problem.
      Specified by:
      getSeverity in interface IRodinProblem
      Returns:
      the severity of this problem (one of error, warning, info).
      See Also:
      • IMarker.SEVERITY

    • getArity

      public int getArity()
      Returns the number of parameters needed by the message of this problem, i.e. the length of the object array to be passed to getLocalizedMessage().
      Returns:
      the number of parameters needed by the message of this problem

    • getErrorCode

      public String getErrorCode()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinProblem
      Returns the error code of this problem.
      Specified by:
      getErrorCode in interface IRodinProblem
      Returns:
      the error code of this problem
      See Also:
      • RodinMarkerUtil.ERROR_CODE

    • getLocalizedMessage

      public String getLocalizedMessage(Object[] args)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinProblem
      Returns a localized message describing this problem for the end-user. The returned message is built with the given arguments.
      Specified by:
      getLocalizedMessage in interface IRodinProblem
      Parameters:
      args - arguments for the message
      Returns:
      a message describing the problem for the end-user
      See Also:
      • IMarker.MESSAGE
